info.description: OpenAPI projection of the finance pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/finance

get.summary: List budgets with optional search / period / active filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a budget

get.summary: Get a single budget (with spend aggregates)
List corrections with optional minConfidence / matchType filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a correction, or reinforce an existing one keyed on (pattern, matchType)
Apply a correction-rule ChangeSet atomically; returns the full rule set
Find the winning correction for a description (null when none match)
List corrections with pending (un-persisted) ChangeSets folded in (temp: rows included), paginated
Preview the before/after match impact of a ChangeSet against caller-supplied transactions
Preview the transactions a candidate (pattern, matchType) rule would match

get.summary: Get a single correction by id

post.summary: Nudge a correction confidence by delta (deletes the row when it drops below 0.3)

get.summary: List entities with per-entity transactionCount; orphanedOnly=true returns count===0

post.summary: Apply a correction ChangeSet atomically, then re-evaluate the import session
Atomically create entities, apply changeSets + tag-rule changeSets, write transactions
Create a new entity during an import session
Write confirmed transactions to SQLite; returns a session id to poll
Start an import process (dedup + entity matching); returns a session id to poll

get.summary: Poll an import session for progress (null when the session is unknown/expired)

post.summary: Re-evaluate the import session against merged (DB + pending) rules; no DB writes
Search the finance pillar's domains (transactions, budgets, wishlist) for the unified search engine
Apply a tag-rule ChangeSet; upserts accepted new vocabulary tags
Preview the suggestion-impact of a tag-rule ChangeSet over the supplied transactions
Propose a tag-rule ChangeSet from a tag-edit signal (deterministic, with impact preview)
Reject a ChangeSet with feedback; optionally returns a revised follow-up proposal

get.summary: List transactions with optional filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a transaction

get.summary: Distinct tag values across all transactions (autocomplete)
Descriptions (+ checksums) of existing transactions for client-side rule preview

post.summary: Restore a previously-deleted transaction from its snapshot

get.summary: Rule-based tag suggestions for a description/entity (no LLM call)

delete.summary: Delete a transaction; returns a snapshot for Undo via restore

get.summary: List wish-list items with optional search / priority filters and pagination

post.summary: Create a wish-list item
